fields.core_offering: David AI builds custom AI systems, voice agents, sales automation, and operational workflows that help service businesses convert more demand into recurring revenue.
fields.decision_makers:
Buyers: CEO, COO, CRO, VP Sales, Managing Partner, Practice Owner
End-Users: front desk staff, office managers, field sales reps, patient coordinators, transaction coordinators
fields.pain_points:
• Leads dying on voicemail and after-hours calls
• Manual copy-paste between disconnected tools
• Failed AI experiments that never ship to production
fields.value_proposition:
• Measurable operational savings within weeks
• Custom systems wired into existing tools
• Flat-fee engagement with production deployment
fields.buying_signals:
• Hiring front desk, coordinators, or ops admins at scale
• Multi-location expansion without proportional back-office headcount
• Paying for generic AI tools with low team adoption
fields.disqualifiers:
• Pre-revenue or sub-10-person teams with no repeatable workflow
• Buyers wanting only a cheap chatbot widget
• No inbound phone, scheduling, or ops complexity
